{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173328EC43B2094925F20594FC"}"},"total":111},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596582931328746302","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，尤其像我一样双坑的人。作者一定要坚持下去！千万千万不要断更啊！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768720793,"group_id":"7582142287996537918","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/qeSgWVSkCz/bh6awTwVtC2EL2UbzAfOVGm2YpfW/Gw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/10159afc30a8419d9e99c07010164ccc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796975&x-signature=blCq21YBVrUtawbJhP8l5C4B5PI%3D","user_id":"1007612261580248","user_name":"爱跑路的厉飞雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1007612261580248","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7582142287996537918","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越斩神世界，苏晨成为了林七夜的同学。
在一间诡异寺庙，遇到了那个终结整个灵异时代的男人。
从此成为了鬼眼杨间的代言人，只要获得情绪值，就能解锁各种灵异能力。
左手鬼柴刀，右手棺材钉。
十层鬼域随手铺开，鬼影随行杀人无形。
守夜人搞不定的超高危事件？我来清场！
古神教会的邪神代理人？一刀斩碎！
境外神明圈养人类的阴谋？直接掀翻棋盘！
管你什么神秘生物，还是神明。
身具多种厉鬼，我才是行走的禁忌。
仅凭鬼杨间，就能轻易横扫任意邪神代言人。
成就神杨间，天上地下，唯我独尊。
我说，眼前之人必将苏醒。
我说，眼前之人灾病全无...
当世人呼喊你名字的那一刻，代表这残酷的时代即将终结！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7354a1c1901aa89d00597869cd04d55f","author":"冷酷临时工","author_id":"","book_id":"7582142287996537918","book_name":"斩神：杨间代理人，开局驾驭鬼眼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582142374680216126","read_count":"18321","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"260170"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"124","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,开局,同人,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe71bbe6aea98e3565f34312f6109484b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442408&x-signature=HhTQ4cm6%2FfgRPlYP5ZHINNT3mug%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"131535978897693","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173328EC43B2094925F20594FC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读56分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_c
